title: Jodhpur、Rajasthan — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Jodhpur、Rajasthan的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Jodhpur是Rajasthan的一个城市，人口约1,200,000。The Blue City of Rajasthan, dominated by the imposing Mehrangarh Fort, known for its blue-painted houses and royal heritage.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
